## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`./vendor/bin/phpunit --testsuite Unit`)
- [ ] Tested on Joomla 5.x or 6.x
- [ ] Screenshots included for UI changes

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No credentials or phone numbers in code
- [ ] No em dashes in strings or comments
- [ ] API calls use POST + JSON (never GET)
- [ ] test=1 flag used in any test code
